svg.text: "Show all students with grade higher than 90"
student_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, -- Unique identifier
SELECT name, grade FROM students WHERE grade > 90
Base LLM Models: GPT-4, Claude 3.5, Gemini 2.0, Llama 3, Qwen
Incorrect dataset → Poor training → Wrong SQL
❌ Semantic: SQL syntactically OK, but logically ≠ question
